text: New Addition: Multiple unsolicited proposals from Saudi Arabia's Alamadiyaf al-Masiyyah, which has due diligence access. No price given.
Shareholders approve scheme, with 98.5% of votes in favour. Aim is for completion by end of Q2 2026.
Court sanctions scheme. Completion scheduled for 12 March 2026.
Deleted from disclosure table. Scheme becomes effective.
